title: Mildly Woodfired Korean Cream Guk
description: A lightly woodfired Korean dish featuring single cream, this guk is a fatty and pillowy treat from the Chungcheong region, wrapped in pandan leaves for added aroma.
instructions: Preheat the woodfired oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Wrap each pandan leaf around a small bowl to form a cup shape and secure with a toothpick.
In a blender, combine the chilled single cream, diced woodfired baked potato, korean chili flakes, garlic, green onion, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper, and blend until smooth.
Pour the cream mixture into the pandan leaf cups.
Place the cups in the woodfired oven and bake for 15 minutes or until the cream is set.
Remove the cups from the oven and let them cool to room temperature.
Serve the Mildly Woodfired Korean Cream Guk chilled, garnished with additional green onion if desired.
